CLM-2026-0041.content: Namaste Rajesh ji! Main ClaimPilot hoon, aapka claims assistant. Aapki JCB 3DX (OD-02-BQ-7734) ke claim ke baare mein baat karte hain. Maine dekha ki 17th March ko construction site pe machine tip ho gayi thi. Aap theek toh hain na?
Haan ji main theek hoon. Operator bhi safe hai. Lekin machine ka bahut damage ho gaya hai, hydraulic arm aur cabin dono.

Bhagwan ka shukar hai sab safe hain! 🙏

Mainne aapka claim CLM-2026-0041 file kar diya hai ICICI Lombard ke paas. Kuch updates:

• Policy verified hai — aapka coverage active hai
• Estimated claim amount: ₹2.4 lakh
• Surveyor M.K. Rao & Associates assign ho gaye hain
• **Inspection 27th March ko scheduled hai**

Aapko kuch documents ready rakhne honge:
1. RC copy (OD-02-BQ-7734)
2. Insurance policy copy
3. Site photos (jo aapne already upload kar diye hain — 8 photos)
4. Operator ka statement

FIR ki zarurat nahi hai kyunki yeh construction site accident hai, no third party involved.

Koi aur sawaal?
Surveyor kab aayega? Aur repair mein kitna time lagega?

Surveyor **kal 27th March** ko aayenge site pe inspection ke liye. M.K. Rao ji experienced hain — JCB equipment ka kaafi experience hai unke paas.

Timeline roughly yeh hogi:

1. **27 Mar** — Surveyor inspection
2. **28-29 Mar** — Survey report submission
3. **30 Mar - 1 Apr** — ICICI Lombard approval
4. **Post approval** — Repair authorization (usually 2-3 weeks for hydraulic work)

JCB 3DX ke hydraulic arm repair mein thoda time lagta hai kyunki parts import hone padte hain kabhi kabhi. But I'll keep tracking and update you har step pe.

Aapke Equifi loan account (EQF-LN-2024-1187) pe bhi flag laga diya hai — taaki EMI related koi issue na ho during claim period. Aapki EMIs current hain, so koi tension nahi! 👍

CLM-2026-0035.content:
Manish ji, aapka Komatsu PC210 claim settled ho gaya hai! 🎉

Final summary:
• **Claimed**: ₹1,12,000
• **Assessed by surveyor**: ₹1,05,000 (depreciation adjustment)
• **ICICI Lombard settlement**: ₹98,500
• **Depreciation deduction**: ₹13,500 (IRDAI guidelines ke as per, rubber/plastic parts pe depreciation lagta hai)

Settlement amount ₹98,500 aapke account mein process ho gaya hai.

Repair Komatsu Authorized workshop, Jatni mein complete ho chuki hai. Vehicle ready for pickup!

Aapke loan account (EQF-LN-2023-0541) se bhi claim flag hata diya gaya hai. Sab clean hai.

Koi aur query ho toh zaroor puchiye. ClaimPilot always here! 🙏
Thank you bhai! Bahut smooth process tha. Ek question — depreciation kyun kata? Bucket toh metal ka hai.

Bahut accha question Manish ji!

Depreciation breakdown:
• **Metal parts (bucket, track links)** — 0% depreciation (IRDAI rules mein metal pe nahi lagta first year)
• **Rubber parts (track pads, seals)** — 50% depreciation
• **Plastic/fibre parts** — 30% depreciation

Aapke case mein:
• Track pads (rubber) ka replacement tha — ₹18,000 pe 50% = ₹9,000 depreciation
• Hydraulic seals (rubber) — ₹9,000 pe 50% = ₹4,500 depreciation
• Total depreciation: ₹13,500

Yeh IRDAI ke Motor Vehicle Insurance guidelines ke as per hai — har insurance company follow karti hai. Metal bucket pe koi depreciation nahi kata gaya.

Next time ke liye tip: agar extended warranty ya zero-depreciation add-on liya ho toh yeh bhi cover hota. Policy renewal pe consider karein! 👍
